label: Batch B
why_it_matters: Shows the next product problem: broad install-folder intake, dependencies, noise, target selection, and package-scale triage.

challenge_profile.headline: Package-scale intake and target selection
challenge_profile.pipeline_pressure: Can MCP Factory keep package-scale row truth honest when most targets finish but one row stalls at closeout?
challenge_profile.breakpoint: Multi-target campaign closeout/status propagation after findings are produced.
challenge_profile.operator_question: Can the UI show useful package-scale progress without pretending the campaign is product-green?
challenge_profile.job_id_note: Partial live campaign b32b323a: 7/8 rows reached done; contoso_reporting job e5967aad produced findings but stayed closeout-stalled.

generated_from: partial live Batch B campaign artifacts
claim_ceiling: partial package-scale diagnostic replay; closeout stalled
next_action: present as partial package-scale pressure evidence; do not claim clean product green

stage_artifacts.name: Package admission
stage_artifacts.purpose: Show package-scale intake and dependency context before treating any runtime target as product proof.

consumes.proof_meaning: Captures package shape, dependency context, and target roles.

emits.name: package intake summary

proves.name: package boundary
proves.proof_meaning: Batch B is partial package-scale diagnostic evidence: live campaign rows exist, but closeout stalled.

stage_artifacts.name: Runtime target selection
stage_artifacts.purpose: Separate dependency-only binaries from the curated runtime targets that would receive deeper analysis.

consumes.name: bundled binary role list
consumes.proof_meaning: Preserves role and confidence labels from the package manifest.

emits.name: selected runtime target list
emits.proof_meaning: 8 runtime targets selected from 8 bundled entries.

proves.name: target selection rationale
proves.proof_meaning: Shows why package breadth does not imply every binary is deeply probed immediately.

stage_artifacts.name: Package-scale blocker harvest
stage_artifacts.purpose: Show the partial live package run: most rows reached done, but one reporting row stalled in closeout/status propagation.

consumes.name: partial live Batch B campaign
consumes.proof_meaning: Campaign b32b323a reached 7/8 terminal rows; one row remained closeout-stalled.

emits.name: partial diagnostic package replay
emits.proof_meaning: Conservatively marks Batch B as partial diagnostic: useful package-scale pressure, not product-green proof.

proves.name: closeout stalled boundary
proves.proof_meaning: Prevents 7/8 package progress and verified findings from being mistaken for clean comparable closeout.

stage_artifacts.name: Reporting closeout stall
stage_artifacts.purpose: Localize the Batch B blocker to campaign closeout/status propagation after the reporting row produced findings.

consumes.name: reporting findings signal
consumes.proof_meaning: contoso_reporting wrote findings, so the blocker is not simply missing analyzer output.

emits.name: closeout/status blocker
emits.proof_meaning: The row stayed exploring/running after findings, so the public claim must remain diagnostic.

proves.name: fail-closed package claim
proves.proof_meaning: 7/8 completed rows and verified annotations are useful pressure evidence, but they do not satisfy clean Batch B closeout.

pipeline_mechanics.title: Input Boundary
pipeline_mechanics.summary: Package-scale manifest accepted as intake evidence; this replay does not publish or execute binaries.

pipeline_mechanics.title: Route Authority
pipeline_mechanics.summary: Batch B has live campaign rows, but not a clean comparable package-level route-authority closeout.

pipeline_mechanics.title: Target Analysis
pipeline_mechanics.summary: Shows partial package execution: 7/8 rows reached terminal state and 89/100 invocable annotations were verified.

pipeline_mechanics.title: Semantic Check
pipeline_mechanics.summary: Some rows produced findings, but the package did not reach a clean comparable semantic closeout.

pipeline_mechanics.title: Closeout / Trust Gate
pipeline_mechanics.summary: Batch B is intentionally kept below product-green because reporting produced findings but remained closeout/status stalled.

facts.label: claim ceiling
facts.value: partial package-scale diagnostic replay; closeout stalled

verifiability.name: Route proof
verifiability.question: Did the run prove it entered the intended compiled-analysis/Ghidra route?
verifiability.meaning: Partial row evidence exists, but package-level route closeout is not comparable.

verifiability.name: Artifact proof
verifiability.question: Did each required stage emit durable derived artifacts?
verifiability.meaning: Campaign rows, reporting findings, and config KPI counts are represented as sanitized derived fields.

verifiability.name: Comparability proof
verifiability.question: Is safe_to_compare true, or is this diagnostic/blocker-only evidence?
verifiability.meaning: safe_to_compare=false; package intake is not comparable product proof.

verifiability.name: Semantic proof
verifiability.question: Did recovered behavior satisfy the fixture contract?
verifiability.meaning: Some target findings are verified/inferred, but package-level semantic proof is not comparable.

verifiability.name: Closeout proof
verifiability.question: Did S07 produce claim ceiling, blocker, and next action?
verifiability.meaning: Claim ceiling is partial package-scale diagnostic replay; closeout/status propagation stalled.

verifiability.name: Failure localization
verifiability.question: If not green, what stage/window owns the first blocker?

ground_truth_note: Batch B is a partial live package-scale replay. Seven rows reached done; reporting produced findings but stalled in closeout/status propagation. This is presentation-safe as diagnostic pressure evidence, not product-green proof.
